title: iberis montana
intro: Iberis montana, also known as candytuft, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its white, pink, or purple blooms and low-growing, spreading habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective against wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Iberis montana include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and alleviating symptoms of coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used as an ornamental plant in gardens and landscapes.
